text: 数据密集的区域。这里存放着大量历史记录。
column4: #texten:Data-dense area. Massive amounts of historical records stored here.

text: 这些记录……是这个文明的历史。
这个文明曾经遍布整个星球，建造了无数壮观的东西。
column5: #texten:This civilization once spanned the entire planet, building countless magnificent things.
#texten:But then... their energy began to run out.

text: 为了争夺剩余的能源，彼此开战。
column5: #texten:They fought each other over what remained.

text: 一个能创造出那种声波艺术的文明，亲手毁掉了自己。
column5: #texten:A civilization that created such beautiful sound art, destroyed itself.
